purpose: Pure leave-eligibility predicates and the modal-state decision for group leave: isLastMember (new), isSoleAdmin (moved verbatim from LeaveGroupButton.tsx), and selectLeaveModalState, which tests last-member before sole-admin (DD-2). Zero React, context, or marmot-ts dependencies.

public_api.name: isLastMember
public_api.signature: isLastMember(memberPubkeys: string[] | undefined, ownPubkeyHex: string | null | undefined): boolean
public_api.description: True when ownPubkeyHex is the group's only member. Case-insensitive both directions. False on any absent/malformed input (undefined memberPubkeys, empty memberPubkeys, null/undefined ownPubkeyHex) — never throws.

public_api.name: isSoleAdmin
public_api.signature: isSoleAdmin(adminPubkeys: string[] | undefined, ownPubkeyHex: string | null | undefined): boolean
public_api.description: True when ownPubkeyHex is the group's only admin. Case-insensitive both directions. Moved verbatim from LeaveGroupButton.tsx:22-28 — behavior unchanged, location only.

public_api.name: selectLeaveModalState
public_api.signature: selectLeaveModalState(memberPubkeys: string[] | undefined, adminPubkeys: string[] | undefined, ownPubkeyHex: string | null | undefined): 'abandon' | 'blocked' | 'confirm'
public_api.description: Decision function for LeaveGroupButton's modal. Tests isLastMember FIRST — a last member is also a sole admin, so admin-first ordering would swallow the abandon case. Returns 'abandon' | 'blocked' | 'confirm'. Fail-closed: undefined memberPubkeys can never yield 'abandon'.
